$comment: PhysWorldLM Golden Reference Example — PW-WSF-1300 Example 04: Air Intercept. 1v1 beyond-visual-range air-to-air engagement between a Blue Force F-16C (Viper) and a Red Force Su-30MK (Flanker). Exercises metadata, world, environment, terrain, weather, organizations, entities (aircraft × 2, BVRAAM missile, radar, IRST, RWR, GPS, INS), assets, missions, behavior, timeline, events, renderer, and output. Canonical integration-test scenario for PhysWorldLM WorldSpec v1.0.0.

metadata.author: PhysWorldLM Architecture Working Group
metadata.description: Golden reference scenario. One Blue Force F-16C and one Red Force Su-30MK engage in a 1v1 beyond-visual-range (BVR) intercept over the Eastern Mediterranean at 08:15 local. Blue fires an AIM-120D AMRAAM; Red attempts a chaff/flare break and radar jamming. Outcome: missile impact at T+95 s. Exercises all PhysWorldLM WorldSpec schemas in a single coherent scenario.

organizations.name: Red Force — 4th Air Army, 22nd Fighter Regiment

entities.name: Viper 1
entities.label: F-16C Block 52 — Viper 1
entities.description: Blue Force F-16C Block 52 Fighting Falcon. Primary BVR interceptor. Carries one AIM-120D AMRAAM on station 7, two AIM-9X on stations 1 and 9, and a full gun load.

entities.name: Flanker Lead
entities.label: Su-30MK Flanker-C — Flanker Lead
entities.description: Red Force Su-30MK multirole fighter. Carries two R-77 (AA-12 Adder) active-radar BVR missiles, two R-73 (AA-11 Archer) short-range IR missiles, and a 30mm cannon. Equipped with IRST, RWR, and jamming pod.

sensors.name: NIIP N011M Bars Fire Control Radar

entities.name: AMRAAM-01
entities.label: AIM-120D AMRAAM — In Flight
entities.description: AIM-120D fired from Viper 1 at T+45 s. Active radar seeker with mid-course datalink update. Not yet spawned at scenario start — spawned by timeline trigger at T=45.

missions.name: CAP ALPHA — Blue Intercept Mission
missions.primary_objective: Intercept and destroy Red Force Su-30MK before it enters ADIZ.
secondary_objectives: Exit engagement area on recovery heading 270.

missions.name: ALPHA SWEEP — Red Offensive Patrol
missions.primary_objective: Patrol assigned sector. Engage any Blue Force aircraft that enters detection range.
secondary_objectives: Return to base if fuel below 20%.

events.notes: Blue CAP mission begins. Viper 1 on patrol heading 090.
Red offensive patrol begins. Flanker 1 heading 270 at 8000 m.
APG-68 radar detects unknown aircraft contact at 148 km, 090 azimuth.
Radar track confirmed hostile. IFF interrogation returns negative. Target classified as hostile Su-30 class. Fire control computer begins intercept solution.
APG-68 achieves STT lock. Fire control computer generates valid intercept firing solution. AMRAAM uncages.
Flanker RWR detects STT lock from Blue Force APG-68. Threat level HIGH. Crew alerted.
AIM-120D fired from Viper 1 station 7 at 74 km range. Rocket motor ignites.
Flanker RWR detects AMRAAM launch warning. Crew initiates defensive break.
Flanker deploys chaff salvo, breaks hard port at 3g, activates Sorbtsiya-S ECM pod. Radar jamming degrades APG-68 track quality.
AMRAAM transitions to mid-course guidance with datalink updates from Viper 1. Seeker still inactive.
Flanker deploys 6 IR flares in defensive break. IR seeker on AMRAAM is not active — flares ineffective against active radar guidance.
AMRAAM seeker goes active at 8 km. Self-guiding. Datalink no longer needed.
Terminal homing. Missile making final guidance corrections.
Proximity fuse detonates at 12 m standoff. Blast and fragmentation envelope engulfs Su-30.
Su-30 suffers catastrophic structural damage. Left engine destroyed. Center fuel tank ruptured. Aircraft uncontrollable.
Su-30 destroyed. Crew ejection confirmed. BDA: KILL CONFIRMED.
Blue CAP mission complete. Primary objective achieved. Viper 1 RTB on heading 270.

timeline.label: T+100 — Cinematic camera cut to Viper RTB
